Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's day two of our vacation in Yakushima...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}I never thought a walk in the woods could be so enjoyable. You can't do this in Iwatodai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 5 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 6 25 25}Oh, did you hear about Junpei-kun yesterday?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 5 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 6 25 25}He was acting so indecent, I didn't know how to react.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 5 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 6 25 25}It's probably a good thing we came out here by ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}...One moment, let me switch over to speakerphone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Well, I'm at the lab here on the island...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And a machine that was considered inoperable suddenly left the facility on its own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}What kind of machine is it? I need more information to locate anything other than Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It's a type of combat vehicle—an anti-Shadow weapon, to be precise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}We gotta tell the others! Where's my phone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}We're not currently with everyone, so it might take some time for us to regroup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}In any case, I want you to handle this as soon as you can. I'm on my way there now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}If we can't secure the target, do we have permission to destroy it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I highly doubt you'll be able to destroy it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}What? Then how are we supposed to stop it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Just do your best. I'll call you again later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Don't worry about it. Let's go back and get our equipment.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Once we do that, we can have Yamagishi's Persona scan the area. Although, searching the whole island won't be easy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Argh! The one time we need them, and they're nowhere to be found![n]{f 1 1}
